zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Lovell於1562年出生在英國素福爾可丹納姆時，她的父親William Lovell32歲，母親Dorothy Arney27歲。她於1580年11月27日與Thomas Jacob Dising在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1621年8月在英國坎布利其爾可頓哈姆享年59歲，埋葬在英國坎布利其爾可頓哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Lovell于1562年出生在英国素福爾可丹納姆时，她的父亲William Lovell32岁，母亲Dorothy Arney27岁。她于1580年11月27日与Thomas Jacob Dising在英国倫敦结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1621年8月在英国坎布利其爾可頓哈姆享年59岁，埋葬在英国坎布利其爾可頓哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Lovell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lovel ‘wolf cub’, a diminutive of lou, love ‘wolf’. Compare Love and Low .

variants.name: Lowell
meanings: English: variant of Lovell , derived from Anglo-Norman Frenchlou ‘wolf’ + the diminutive suffix -el.

History: Lowell is the surname of one of America's most distinguished NewEngland families, which have been prominent for over 200 years. Itsfounder, John Lowell (1743–1802), was a legislator and judge. Thecity of Lowell, MA was named in honor of his son Francis Cabot Lowell(1775–1817), a textile manufacturer.

variants.name: Love
meanings: English: from a Middle English personal name derived from the Old English female name Lufu ‘love’, or the masculine equivalent Lufa. Compare Leaf 2.

English and Scottish: nickname from Anglo-Norman French love ‘she-wolf’ or simply ‘wolf’, the word love being a back-formation from the diminutive forms lovel and lovet ‘little wolf’. See also Low 3, from Anglo-Norman French lou, the more usual form of the word.
Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhionghuin (see McKinnon ).

variants.name: Loveall
meanings: English: presumably a variant of   Lovell  , or possibly a habitational name from Lovehall in Tayside.

variants.name: Lovewell
meanings: English (mainly Norfolk): from Middle English love ‘love’ (Old English lufian ‘to love’) + wel ‘well’ (Old English wel), presumably denoting a lover or philanderer. There may have been some confusion with Lovell .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Lovell was born in 1562, in Denham, Suffolk, England, her father, William Lovell, was 32 and her mother, Dorothy Arney, was 27. She married Thomas Jacob Dising on 27 November 1580, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in August 1621, in Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Lovell est née en 1562, à Denham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, William Lovell, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Dorothy Arney, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Jacob Dising le 27 novembre 1580, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en août 1621, à Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Lovell 1562 in Denham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Lovell 32 und ihre Mutter Dorothy Arney 27. Sie hat am 27. November 1580 in London, England Thomas Jacob Dising geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im August 1621 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, England und wurde in Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Lovell è nata il nel 1562 nel Denham, Suffolk, England, sua padre, William Lovell, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Dorothy Arney, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Jacob Dising il 27 novembre 1580, nel London, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel agosto 1621, nel Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Lovellが1562年にイギリススフォルクデンハムで生まれた時，父William Lovellは32歳，母Dorothy Arneyは27歳であった。1580年11月27日にイギリスロンドンでThomas Jacob Disingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1621年8月にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアコッテンハムで59歳で死去し，イギリスカンブリジェシュアイアコッテンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Lovell(이)가 1562년 영국 수폴크 데함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Lovell(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dorothy Arney(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1580년 11월 27일 영국 런던에서 Thomas Jacob Dising(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1621년 8월 영국 캄브리지실르 컷함에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 캄브리지실르 컷함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Lovell nasceu em 1562, em Denham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Lovell, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Dorothy Arney, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Jacob Dising em 27 de novembro de 1580, em London, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em agosto de 1621, em Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Lovell родилась в 1562 г. в местности денам, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени William Lovell было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Dorothy Arney, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Jacob Dising 27 ноября 1580 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла август 1621 г. в местности коттенам, камбриджешир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности коттенам, камбриджешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Lovell nació en 1562, en Denham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, William Lovell, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Dorothy Arney, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Thomas Jacob Dising el 27 de noviembre de 1580, en London, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en agosto de 1621, en Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.
